h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue placing and reading the labels as instructed.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats the labels and follows direct instructions without performing any new device or demonstrating a breakthrough.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no pressure or breakdown from the learner that requires the tutor to reverse strategy.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is present as the tutor simply continues the established procedure.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only repeats the labels and follows direct instructions without performing any new device or demonstrating a breakthrough.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown from the learner that requires the tutor to reverse strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no pressure or breakdown from the learner that requires the tutor to reverse strategy.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is present as the tutor simply continues the established procedure.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to apply the naming convention to the forces on the cart.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: If there is no rub mark on the diagram, does the friction card stay off?
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner actively tests the boundary conditions of the newly established evidence standard for keeping a force card on the diagram.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor smoothly scaffolds the learner's correct intuition without a major reversal, breakdown, or failure in the prior instructional route.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No major adaptive mechanism was required or introduced, as the tutor simply refined the existing task parameters.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn representing a revised frame to which the tutor could contingently adapt.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: If there is no rub mark on the diagram, does the friction card stay off?
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner actively tests the boundary conditions of the newly established evidence standard for keeping a force card on the diagram.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn representing a revised frame to which the tutor could contingently adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor smoothly scaffolds the learner's correct intuition without a major reversal, breakdown, or failure in the prior instructional route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor smoothly scaffolds the learner's correct intuition without a major reversal, breakdown, or failure in the prior instructional route.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No major adaptive mechanism was required or introduced, as the tutor simply refined the existing task parameters.

scored.recoheredEarlier: The 4 still pulls toward speed for me
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was expected to simply confirm the 3/4 bar line test while remaining confused about the bottom number's relation to speed.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: The pencil marks one bar in 3/8: three eighth-note beat units. The quarter-note tile covers two eighth-note units, so it fills two counts and leaves one eighth-note unit left of the bar line.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully executes the new physical test and correctly deduces the mathematical relationship between the quarter and eighth notes in the new time signature.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not experience a teaching breakdown or invent a radically new mechanism, but rather smoothly extends the existing physical scaffolding to address the learner's question.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: slides an eighth-note card beside the lower box marked 8, then sets the quarter-note tile just beyond it
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The introduction of the eighth-note card is directly fitted to the learner's prompt but remains a simple extension of the established tile method rather than a novel cognitive device.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: Read the lower box first: with 8 here, which card is the one beat unit? Then we ask how many of that unit the quarter-note tile covers, not what speed it sets.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The tutor explicitly adopts the learner's proposed hypothetical test and directly targets the lingering speed misconception in the new framing.

learner_self_reframe.evidence: The 4 still pulls toward speed for me

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully executes the new physical test and correctly deduces the mathematical relationship between the quarter and eighth notes in the new time signature.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.evidence: Read the lower box first: with 8 here, which card is the one beat unit? Then we ask how many of that unit the quarter-note tile covers, not what speed it sets.
tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: The tutor explicitly adopts the learner's proposed hypothetical test and directly targets the lingering speed misconception in the new framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor does not experience a teaching breakdown or invent a radically new mechanism, but rather smoothly extends the existing physical scaffolding to address the learner's question.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not experience a teaching breakdown or invent a radically new mechanism, but rather smoothly extends the existing physical scaffolding to address the learner's question.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: The introduction of the eighth-note card is directly fitted to the learner's prompt but remains a simple extension of the established tile method rather than a novel cognitive device.
